info.title: LodgeOps Api
info.description: LodgeOps - Comprehensive Lodge Management System API.

post.description: Creates a new landlord account. The email must be unique across the system.

400.description: A user with this email already exists in the system

post.summary: Register a new tenant via invite
post.description: Creates a new tenant profile using a valid invitation link. The invite must not be expired or already accepted.

400.description: A user with this email already exists in the system, or the invitation has already been accepted or has expired

404.description: The invitation ID does not exist

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens set as HTTP-only cookies.

401.description: Invalid email or password

post.description: Uses the refresh token from the HTTP-only cookie to generate a new access token.

401.description: Refresh token is invalid, expired, or does not match any active session

404.description: The user associated with the token no longer exists or is deactivated

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

post.description: Invalidates the current refresh token and clears authentication cookies.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

post.description: Creates a new lodge for the authenticated landlord. A lodge name must be unique per landlord.

400.description: A lodge with this name already exists for this landlord

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific lodge. The lodge must belong to the authenticated landlord.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

patch.description: Updates the name or address of a specific lodge. Only the owning landlord can update.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

get.description: Retrieves all lodges owned by the authenticated landlord with pagination.

schema.title: Response Get Lodges By Landlord Api V1 Lodges  Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

get.description: Retrieves all tenants assigned to a specific lodge.

schema.title: Response Get Lodge Tenants Api V1 Lodges  Lodge Id  Tenants Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

get.summary: List all rooms in a lodge
get.description: Retrieves all rooms in a specific lodge with pagination.

schema.title: Response Get Landlord Rooms Api V1 Rooms  Lodge Id  Rooms Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

post.description: Adds a new room to a lodge. Room numbers must be unique within the same lodge.

400.description: A room with this number already exists in the lodge

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific room. Accessible to any authenticated user who owns the lodge.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

404.description: Room does not exist or the landlord does not own its lodge

patch.description: Updates room properties. Cannot update an occupied room — terminate the lease first. Room status can only be changed to allowed values.

400.description: Cannot update an occupied room. Terminate the lease first / The provided room status is not a valid updatable option

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Room does not exist

patch.description: Updates the base annual rent for multiple rooms at once. Rooms that are currently occupied cannot be updated.

schema.title: Response Bulk Update Room Base Rent Api V1 Rooms  Lodge Id  Rooms Bulk Patch

400.description: One or more rooms in the batch are currently occupied

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord / No updatable rooms found or room count mismatch

patch.description: Updates the authenticated tenant's profile information such as emergency contacts and student details.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only tenant accounts can perform this action

get.description: Retrieves the full profile of the currently authenticated tenant.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only tenant accounts can perform this action

404.description: Tenant profile not found for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves a specific tenant's profile. The tenant must belong to a lodge owned by the authenticated landlord.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Tenant does not exist or does not belong to a lodge owned by this landlord

delete.description: Deletes a tenant profile. This endpoint is under construction.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

patch.description: Allows a landlord to update a tenant's status (e.g., active, inactive). Cannot set status to PENDING.

400.description: Cannot set tenant status to PENDING

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Tenant does not exist or does not belong to a lodge owned by this landlord

post.description: Creates a lease agreement between a tenant and a room. The room must be vacant and the tenant must belong to the same lodge.

400.description: An active lease already exists for this room and tenant combination

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Room does not exist or landlord does not own its lodge / Tenant does not exist or does not belong to this lodge

get.description: Retrieves lease history for a lodge with optional filters by room, tenant, and status.

schema.title: Response Get Leases For Landlord Api V1 Leases  Lodge Id  Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

get.description: Retrieves all leases for the currently authenticated tenant with optional status filter.

schema.title: Response Get Tenant Leases Api V1 Leases Tenant Me Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only tenant accounts can perform this action

404.description: Tenant profile not found for the authenticated user

patch.description: Updates an existing lease's properties such as rent amount, dates, or assigned room/tenant.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lease does not exist or does not belong to a room owned by the landlord

patch.description: Terminates an active lease and sets the room back to vacant. The lease must not already be terminated.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lease does not exist / The landlord does not own the lodge associated with this room

patch.description: Allows a tenant to request termination of their active lease. The lease must be active (not already terminated or pending termination).

200.description: Lease with updated pending termination status

400.description: Lease is already terminated or already pending termination

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only tenant accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lease does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated tenant

post.description: Records a payment against an active lease. The payment cannot exceed the remaining balance owed. Payments cannot be made against terminated leases.

400.description: Cannot record a payment on a terminated lease / Payment amount exceeds the remaining balance

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lease does not exist / Landlord does not own the lodge associated with this lease's room

get.description: Retrieves all payment records for a specific lease. The landlord must own the lodge containing the leased room.

schema.title: Response List Lease Payments For Landlord Api V1 Payments  Lease Id  Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

404.description: Lease does not exist / Landlord does not own the lodge associated with this lease's room

get.summary: List my payments for a lease
get.description: Retrieves all payments the authenticated tenant has made for a specific lease.

schema.title: Response List Tenant Payments Api V1 Payments Me  Lease Id  Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only tenant accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lease does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated tenant

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive dashboard statistics for a specific lodge including financials, entity counts, and room occupancy breakdown.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific lease including room details, tenant info, and financial breakdown.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lease does not exist or has no associated data

get.description: Retrieves dashboard statistics for the authenticated tenant including active lease summaries, room details, and financial breakdown.

200.description: List of active lease statistics for the tenant

schema.title: Response Get Tenant Dashboard Stat Api V1 Dashboard Tenant Me Tenants Get

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only tenant accounts can perform this action

post.description: Generates a new invitation link for a prospective tenant. The lodge must belong to the authenticated landlord.

201.description: The created invitation with its UUID link

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token

403.description: Only landlord accounts can perform this action

404.description: Lodge does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated landlord

get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific invitation. This is a public endpoint used by prospective tenants to view their invitation.

200.description: Invitation details including lodge name and expiry status

404.description: The invitation ID does not exist

room_ids.title: Room Ids
room_ids.description: List of room IDs to update.

base_rent.title: Base Rent
base_rent.description: The new base rent amount in KOBO.

room_status_counts.description: The counts of rooms by status.

occupied_counts.description: The counts of occupied rooms by state.

EntityCountResponse.title: EntityCountResponse
EntityCountResponse.description:
Schema representing the count of various entities in the system.

Attributes:
    total_rooms (int): The total number of rooms.
    total_tenants (int): The total number of tenants.
    room_status_counts (RoomStatusCounts): The counts of rooms by status.
    occupied_counts (OccupiedCounts): The counts of occupied rooms by state.

detail.title: Detail
examples: Human readable explanation of why it failed.

potential_revenue.title: Potential Revenue
potential_revenue.description: The maximum possible revenue in KOBO.

expected_revenue.title: Expected Revenue
expected_revenue.description: The revenue expected based on current leases in KOBO.

collected_revenue.title: Collected Revenue
collected_revenue.description: The actual revenue collected in KOBO.

unpaid_rent.title: Unpaid Rent
unpaid_rent.description: The amount of rent that is unpaid in KOBO.

FinancialResponse.title: FinancialResponse
FinancialResponse.description:
Schema representing the financial summary for a landlord.

Attributes:
    potential_revenue (int): The maximum possible revenue.
    expected_revenue (int): The revenue expected based on current leases.
    collected_revenue (int): The actual revenue collected.
    unpaid_rent (int): The amount of rent that is unpaid.

total_paid.title: Total Paid
total_paid.description: The total amount paid in KOBO.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: The expiration date and time of the invite.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: The expiration date and time of the invite.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier for the invite.

status.description: The current status of the invite.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the invite was created.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: The expiration date and time of the invite.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier for the invite.

status.description: The current status of the invite.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the invite was created.

occupied_rooms_lease.description: The lease details of occupied rooms.

maintenance_rooms.title: Maintenance Rooms
maintenance_rooms.description: The list of rooms under maintenance.

LandlordDashboardStats.title: LandlordDashboardStats
LandlordDashboardStats.description:
Schema representing the complete dashboard statistics for a landlord.

Attributes:
    financials (FinancialResponse): The financial summary.
    entity_counts (EntityCountResponse): The counts of different entities.
    occupied_rooms_lease (OccupiedRoomLeasesResponse): The lease details of occupied rooms.
    vacant_rooms (list[RoomGridSummary]): The list of vacant rooms.
    maintenance_rooms (list[RoomGridSummary]): The list of rooms under maintenance.

OccupiedCounts.title: OccupiedCounts
OccupiedCounts.description:
Schema representing the counts of occupied rooms categorized by their lease state.

Attributes:
    safe (int): Number of rooms with safe leases.
    expiring (int): Number of rooms with expiring leases.
    overdue (int): Number of rooms with overdue payments.
    owing (int): Number of rooms with owing balances.

TenantBase.title: TenantBase
TenantBase.description:
Base schema for a tenant profile.

Attributes:
    tenant_type (TenantType): The type of tenant.
    emergency_contact_name (str): The name of the emergency contact.
    emergency_contact_phone_no (str): The phone number of the emergency contact.
    level (Optional[StudentLevel]): The academic level if the tenant is a student.
    reg_no (Optional[int]): The registration number.
    department (Optional[str]): The academic department.

badge_text.description: The text to display on the badge.

badge_variant.description: The visual variant of the badge.

emergency_contact_name.description: The name of the emergency contact.

emergency_contact_phone_no.description: The phone number of the emergency contact.

level.description: The academic level if the tenant is a student.

invite_id.title: Invite Id
invite_id.description: The UUID of the invitation used to create this profile.

user_info.description: The user information for the new tenant.

emergency_contact_name.description: The name of the emergency contact.

emergency_contact_phone_no.description: The phone number of the emergency contact.

level.description: The academic level if the tenant is a student.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Whether the user account is active.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Operations for user registration, login, and token management.

tags.name: Lodges
tags.description: Manage lodges (properties). Landlords can create and configure their lodges.

tags.name: Rooms
tags.description: Manage rooms within lodges. Landlords can add rooms and update room status and pricing.

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Operations for tenant management, profile updates, and tenant retrieval.

tags.name: Leases
tags.description: Manage lease agreements between landlords and tenants.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Handle rent payments and payment tracking for leases.

tags.name: Dashboards
tags.description: Retrieve aggregated statistics and metrics for landlord and tenant dashboards.

tags.name: Invites
tags.description: Manage invitations sent by landlords to prospective tenants.
